ref_text_raw: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

text: Australia's Mitchell Gowrie finished 11th in the men's standing super-G. Chet's competitor Ulrich Jöckelmann finished 16th in the men's sitting super-G.
